orgPolicy.title: Variable Cash Award — New Greenhouse Offer Field
orgPolicy.summary: Variable cash compensation has expanded to all salaried L1–L5 Gusties. A new Greenhouse offer field is now required: 'Are they receiving a % Variable Cash Award?' with three options.
bullets: Three options: No - Hourly/Not Eligible, Yes - US Candidate, Yes - CANADA Candidate
Variable targets: L1–L3: 5%, L4: 7.5%, L5: 10% of base salary
Program is 50% individual / 50% company performance split
If clicking 'Yes', a drop-down appears to enter the % number
L6 variable target updated to 25% (from 20%) — reflected in FY27 offer calculators
Always double-check offer details before sending offer letters

tp.point: Variable cash is now part of every salaried L1–L5 offer. You must complete the new GH field or the offer letter won't have the right language. Ask your PE if unsure.

orgPolicy.title: Hiring Committee: Invite PE Now Owns Follow-Up (Not Invite Ops)
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Leadership is now facilitating Hiring Committee sessions and follow-ups. Direct any HC questions or candidate update requests to your Invite PE.
bullets: Invite Ops is still supporting with candidate preps for now
For HC candidate questions or status updates → go to your Invite PE, not Invite Ops

tp.point: If you have a question about a submitted HC candidate, go to your PE — not Invite Ops.

orgPolicy.title: Scorecard Standards: Human-Written Summary Required for HC
orgPolicy.summary: Scorecards submitted to Hiring Committee must include a human-authored synthesis — not just BrightHire/AI-generated transcription. This is the #1 flag in HC right now.
bullets: Every scorecard needs a human-led summary — the interviewer's take, not just a raw transcript
Transcription-only scorecards will be flagged in HC, reflecting on Invite as a function
Do NOT submit to HC if a scorecard is still missing its human summary — a delayed submission is better than an incomplete one
Hold your interviewers accountable to this standard

tp.point: AI tools support scorecards — they don't replace the interviewer's voice. No summary = delayed HC submission.

orgPolicy.title: FY27 Offer Calculators Now Live
orgPolicy.summary: Updated FY27 offer calculators reflecting variable comp are now active. Use these for all offers going forward.
bullets: L6: variable target is now 25% (updated from 20%)
L1–L5: file is manual — enter variable $ or % depending on offer type
Hourly (all L1–L5): $1,250 flat target; Salary: L1–L3 5%, L4 7.5%, L5 10%
Saved in the Invite shared Drive folder

tp.point: Use the new FY27 offer calculators for every offer — the old ones don't reflect variable comp.

orgPolicy.title: Comp Band Sheets — Temporary Workaround
orgPolicy.summary: Comp band spreadsheets are temporarily down. Two interim solutions are available while PeopleTech works on a fix.
bullets: View comp range in Greenhouse job details (see Laura's Loom video in #invite-team)
Ping your PE directly for comp info — PEs have access to a master comp band spreadsheet
Do NOT share the PE master spreadsheet with the broader team

tp.point: Comp sheets are down. Use GH job details or ask your PE — don't block offers waiting for the sheets.

orgPolicy.title: Invite Within The Law: New Quick Resource
orgPolicy.summary: A temporary reference resource for legal/compliance questions in recruiting is now live while the formal training is being refreshed.
bullets: Resource URL: https://sites.google.com/gusto.com/invite-academy/invite-within-the-law
Invite Within the Law training sessions are on pause pending a refresh

orgPolicy.title: Onboarding Location Field — Updated Options in GH
orgPolicy.summary: PeopleTech has updated the Onboarding Location field in offer details. Workday now ingests this data, so accuracy is critical.
bullets: New options: Remote, San Francisco, New York, Denver
Ensures onboarding team sends correct details to new hires

items.heading: InviteOS New Features Now Live
bullets: Pending Actions: centralized view of candidate emails to review, scorecards to review, and referrals to review
Submit Feedback button: in-app button sends bugs/ideas directly to People Tech Jira queue
Beta testers wanted for Debrief & Hiring Committee Agent — reply in the #invite-team thread to join
Loom walkthrough available in #invite-team

items.heading: Cycle 2 Invite Cycle Planning Tracker Now Active
bullets: Cycle 2 runs June 15 – July 31
Notion tracker is the single source of truth for all Invite work (cycle initiatives, BAU, backlog)
6 initiatives logged; PEs needed to fill in 'What is this?' and 'Done when...' fields by EOD June 13
Saumya Chopra (People Tech) joining next PE meeting to discuss req multi-step approval and req routing pain points

items.heading: VMA Evolution Launching August 3rd
bullets: VMA is being refreshed: updated question bank, calibrated rubric, new AI mindset component
Nomination flow replaces self-volunteering — I&O partners with Invite PEs to build interviewer bench
VMA returning to standalone interview for CX (DSA) and Engineering (was consolidated into other interviews)
Performance tie-in: VMA participation named as formal contribution for L3–L6 Gusties
Escalation path: Kristin Ruehle for L1–L5, Scott Helmes for L6+
Email went out to Gusto Admins Friday June 12 — PEs to follow up with I&O partners in next two weeks

items.heading: Project Orbit Survey — Due EOD Monday June 15
bullets: Teresa Waggoner and Kebone Moloko are building Project Orbit: quarterly coaching sessions for PEs
Survey baseline (~10 min) due EOD Monday June 15
Link: https://forms.gle/dGJTzsLHifTFKmrs7

items.heading: Greenhouse Open for Ops Conference — Key Takeaways
bullets: Lisa Pham and Alli Belamide attended June 10; theme: 'Built to Flex'
Key reframes: Time to Fill is a lagging indicator; Quality of Hire belongs to HMs, not TA; activity metrics = development tool not micromanagement
Human-in-the-Loop framework: 100% human (high-judgment), AI-assisted (screening, scheduling), Fully automated (onboarding workflows)
GH products to watch: Fraud detection, Notetaker (BrightHire copycat), Analytics, Ezra (AI screening)
